title: cacalia scorpioides var. sororia
intro: Cacalia scorpioides var. sororia, also known as Chinese button, is a type of flowering plant in the family Compositae, characterized by its unique button-like inflorescence. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Cacalia scorpioides var. sororia include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of fever and cough. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
